LMM Composition Analysis Summary

Generated: 2026-03-20 15:09

Module Overview

Green = final modules used downstream. Light Red = interpretable but excluded (with reasoning). Dark Red = hard to interpret.

ModuleLabelN GenesCorrelationDirectionExpected Cell OriginClassificationInterpretationReasoning
midnightblueMyeloid / Invasion Interface212+0.721UpImmuneTransformational + ProgressiveMyeloid RemodelingTAM and invasive interface biology. Contains FCGR1A, FCGR2A, FCGR3A, MMP1/3/11/12/13, TREM2, MSR1, IL6, CXCL8. Clear pathway enrichment for myeloid activation, EMT, collagen degradation, TNFa signaling. Transformational + Progressive.
grey60Cell Cycle174+0.710UpTumor-IntrinsicTransformational + ProgressiveTumor Intrinsic, Progressive Checkpoint OverrideStrongly enriched for cell cycle pathways (E2F targets, G2M checkpoint) despite being a small module (174 genes). Hub genes include E2F1, FOXM1, AURKA, BUB1, TERT, PRAME. Transformational + Progressive.
brownCilia1258-0.639DownTumor-IntrinsicTransformationalTumor Intrinsic, Transformational Cilia LossCilia-enriched module showing a facet of cell identity. Transformational with a clear drop between Nevus and RGP stages.
blueCellular Biogenesis1452+0.625UpTumor-IntrinsicTransformational + ProgressiveTumor Intrinsic, Progressive Cell BiogenesisEnriched in cellular biogenesis pathways (ribosome biogenesis, Golgi transport, mTORC1, protein secretion). Transformational + Progressive with clear increase in biosynthesis across progression. Note: eigengene correlation with green is 0.78 but distinct biology (biosynthesis vs energy production).
pinkStromal / ECM498-0.465DownStromalTransformationalStromal RemodelingTransformational. Stromal/ECM genes (FBLN5, SLIT3, SVEP1) but stage remains significant in Model 1 after controlling for stromal composition, indicating the ECM program itself changes with progression.
yellowMelanocyte Identity1163-0.439DownTumor-IntrinsicTransformationalTumor Intrinsic, Transformational Identity LossTransformational. Melanocyte identity genes including master regulators PAX3, SOX10, BNC2. TF = SOX9.
greenOXPHOS / Mitochondria970+0.426UpTumor-IntrinsicTransformationalTumor Intrinsic, Transformational Metabolic ProcessTransformational. OXPHOS, mitochondrial translation, and respiratory electron transport. Captures metabolic reprogramming during progression.
turquoiseAdaptive Immune1808+0.378UpImmuneImmune InfiltrationImmune ResponseCompositional. Tracks immune infiltration quantity rather than per-cell transcriptional changes.
redNeural / Synaptic822-0.735DownTumor-IntrinsicTransformationalExcluded. Same lineage axis as yellow (melanocyte identity). Red captures neural crest identity (synapse assembly, axon development) which overlaps with melanocyte differentiation.
blackCytoplasmic Ribosomes574-0.519DownTumor-IntrinsicTransformationalExcluded. Cytoplasmic ribosomal proteins (RPL/RPS genes). Redundant with green on the metabolic axis — both capture aspects of cellular metabolism, though black represents translation machinery while green represents energy production.
lightgreenVascular / Endothelial168+0.223UpEndothelialCompositionalExcluded. Tracks stromal and vascular cell proportion with no stage significance. Not informative for tumor progression.
salmonHard to Interpret238-0.696DownHard to Interpret
lightyellowHard to Interpret157+0.624UpHard to Interpret
greenyellowHard to Interpret280-0.579DownHard to Interpret
lightcyanHard to Interpret208+0.486UpHard to Interpret
purpleHard to Interpret309-0.469DownHard to Interpret
magentaHard to Interpret311+0.401UpHard to Interpret
cyanHard to Interpret219+0.348UpHard to Interpret
tanHard to Interpret245-0.306DownHard to Interpret
Model 1: ME ~ stage + TumorNevus_pct + Immune_pct + (1|patient)
  • ME: Module eigengene (logCPM-based, z-scored)
  • stage: Categorical (Nevus, Intermediate, MIS, RGP, VGP; reference = Nevus)
  • TumorNevus_pct: (Tumor_pct + Nevus_pct) from QuPath, z-scored
  • Immune_pct: Immune / TotalCells from QuPath, z-scored
  • (1|patient): Random intercept per patient

Sensitivity Analysis (Nevus/RGP/VGP only)

Model 2: ME ~ stage + Tumor_pct + Immune_pct + (1|patient)
  • ME: Module eigengene (logCPM-based, z-scored)
  • stage: Categorical (RGP, VGP only; reference = RGP)
  • Tumor_pct: Tumor_pct from QuPath (no Nevus), z-scored
  • Immune_pct: Immune / TotalCells from QuPath, z-scored
  • (1|patient): Random intercept per patient

  • QuPath_pct: Tissue composition feature (z-scored). Tests: Immune_pct, Stroma_pct, TumorNevus_pct

  • ME: Module eigengene (logCPM-based, z-scored)
  • (1|patient): Random intercept per patient
